findings.title: D11 not built: `./check.sh` green not demonstrated
findings.scenario: Acceptance criterion is `./check.sh` exits 0 (fmt, clippy -D warnings, all tests incl. insta). The read-only coverage gate cannot execute commands, and the tree offers no file-anchored proof of a green run: the working tree still has uncommitted churn across src/keymap.rs, src/ui/app.rs, src/ui/dashboard.rs, modified and new snapshots, and a new proptest-regressions/ui/ entry. Run ./check.sh and confirm exit 0 to close this deliverable.
